sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98056" key="su/zhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σύζησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n98056.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a living together</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4017.tlg001:156:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Syrian.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Metaph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">156.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
